message.content:
@startuml
title Deploy workload

actor User
database tfexplorer
actor node

User -> tfexplorer : 1 send workloads definition

tfexplorer -> node : 2 ensure enough capacity is available in the pool.
tfexplorer -> tfexplorer : 3 decrease remaining pool capacity
tfexplorer -> node : 4 sends workloads definition

alt [workload deployed sucesfully]
    node -> tfexplorer : 5 result success
    tfexplorer -> node : 6 user access its workload
end

alt [failed to deploy workload or provision timeout reached]
    node -> tfexplorer : 7 cancel full reservation
    tfexplorer -> tfexplorer : 8 increase remaining pool capacity
end

@enduml
